description_long: This is a hand-forged metal knife with a single-edged, slightly curved blade and a distinctive, twisted handle. The blade has a dark, matte finish with visible forging marks, giving it a rustic and artisanal appearance. The handle is crafted from the same piece of metal as the blade, featuring a spiral twist and ending in a rounded loop, which may serve as a hanging point or for improved grip. There is no visible guard separating the blade from the handle, and the transition between the two is smooth and continuous. The overall design is utilitarian yet decorative, reminiscent of traditional blacksmith work. The knife appears robust and functional, suitable for both display and practical use.
description: A hand-forged metal knife with a twisted handle and a single-edged, slightly curved blade, featuring a rustic, matte finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the blade and the twisted, looped handle.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the handle's spiral profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the blade's curve and the handle's decorative twist.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, emphasizing the blade's thickness and handle's twist.
attribute_handle_design: twisted metal, integral with blade, looped end, no additional grip material
